goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'norwich' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:00' and should leave on 'monday'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '3 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'mahal of cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'food type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to norwich and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 21:00 and should leave on monday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 3 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called mahal of cambridge
Make sure you get price range and food type
